foundations.label: Foundations
foundations.note: Select six credit hours from the Foundations group (DANC 250, 260, 270, 280, 360, 370, 394, 395, 397, 398, or a MUSC/THTR elective). Some courses require declared DANC major/minor status.

studioTechniques.label: Studio Techniques
studioTechniques.note: Select twelve credit hours of any level from the Studio Techniques group (DANC 111, 121, 131, 212, 213, 222, 232, 261, 275, 312, 314, 324, 331, 341, 343).
